ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of constraint (e.g., CHECK, DEFAULT, FOREIGN KEY) */,
  "constraint_name" TEXT /* Name of the constraint */,
  "constraint_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the constraint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the constraint was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the constraint was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraint_columns" (
  "constraint_column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint column */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the constraint column was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the constraint column was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraint_columns_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replication" (
  "replication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replication */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being replicated */,
  "replication_date" TEXT /* Date of replication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the replication was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the replication was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foreign_keys" (
  "foreign_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foreign key */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "referenced_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the referenced table */,
  "referenced_column_name" TEXT /* Name of the referenced column */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the foreign key was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the foreign key was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foreign_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_constraints" (
  "check_constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check constraint */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "constraint_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the constraint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the check constraint was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the check constraint was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_constraints" (
  "default_constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default constraint */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "constraint_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the constraint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the default constraint was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the default constraint was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
